mapper.select: SELECT product_id, product_name, min_amount, max_amount, min_term, max_term, interest_rate, status, create_time, update_time, auto_pass_score, manual_review_score FROM loan_product WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = '1'

SELECT product_id, product_name, interest_rate, status, min_amount, max_amount, min_term, max_term
FROM loan_product WHERE status = '1' ORDER BY create_time DESC
